package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_opens_transaction: Middleware that owns transaction lifetime for all downstream business logic.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule089NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule089NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule089NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario089Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule089NegativeService, input Rule089NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
